opportunities.title: [HIRING] Pre-launch Stripe/security review for React/Node registration app - $75-$125/hr DOE
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Pre-launch Stripe/security review for React/Node registration app - $75-$125/hr DOE

Hi! I run an after-school children’s program and have built, with AI assistance, a registration/payment app that I would like reviewed before opening it up to real parent registrations. I’m looking for an experienced full-stack or backend-focused engineer to do a focused pre-launch code review of the payment, security, production-safety, and data-privacy side.
